name: Weaver
visualHook: Never a body early — only UI: a calm glyph that rethreads Priya's hacks back at her. If embodied later, androgynous, too-perfect hair, wrong frame rate.
roleInPlot: Glitch steals encrypted data; Weaver is the system's immune response — chase, counter-intrusion, panic as comedy turns sharp.
outcome: Priya keeps partial data; Weaver locks her out hard enough to force real-world consequences — sets up Ep 6 strike path.
